title: SRHR for Young People with Disabilities
content: Young people with disabilities have the same rights to sexual and reproductive health as everyone else. We provide accessible info to help you navigate your health journeys.

title: Disability and Sexuality: Myths vs Facts
content: Myth: People with disabilities don't have sexual feelings. Fact: Sexuality is a natural part of being human for everyone, including those with disabilities.

title: Consent and Bodily Autonomy
content: Making sure you're in control of your body and choices, especially when you need support from others for your daily needs.

title: Inclusive Menstrual Health
content: Providing tips and tools for people with diverse abilities to manage their periods with dignity.

title: Accessible STI Information
content: Information about STIs and prevention in easy-to-read and audio-ready formats for all young people.

title: Affirming Care for Vulnerable Youth
content: Every young person deserves to be treated with respect, dignity, and care that reflects their unique identity.

title: Inclusion and Dignity in SRHR
content: Challenging stigma and creating spaces where all young people feel they belong and their voices are heard.

title: Peer Support for All
content: Building communities where diverse youth can share their experiences and support one another in Kenya.

title: Navigating Healthcare with Disabilities
content: Practical advice for communicating with doctors and ensuring your needs are met during health visits.

title: Gender and Disability
content: Understanding how gender norms and expectations affect SRHR experiences for young people with diverse abilities.

title: Advocating for Accessibility
content: Empowering young people to speak up for better accessibility in schools and health facilities in Kenya.

title: Safe Spaces Online
content: Helping you find online communities that are inclusive, safe, and supportive of your SRHR needs.

title: Self-Advocacy in Kenyan Clinics
content: Tips for ensuring your rights are respected when visiting public and private SRHR clinics in Kenya.

title: Building Inclusive Relationships
content: How to talk about your needs and rights with partners in a respectful and empowering way.

title: Empowered and Informed
content: Bringing it all together: your rights, your health, and your future as a young person of any background.
